description_long: This is a dark brown cylindrical container with a slightly flared rim and a smooth, glossy surface. The exterior is embossed with repeating text that reads 'PACS PARTY' and 'PACS', arranged in horizontal lines around the upper half of the container. Below the text, there are subtle embossed outlines of feet, adding a playful or thematic element to the design. The container appears to be made of plastic, with a uniform color and no visible seams or additional components. The interior is hollow, suggesting it is designed to hold a liquid or cream, typical for lotion packaging. The overall appearance is sleek and modern, with a focus on branding and minimalistic decoration.
description: A dark brown, glossy cylindrical lotion container with embossed text and feet outlines, featuring a smooth, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the embossed 'PACS PARTY' text and feet outlines clearly on the dark brown surface.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view with the embossed text and feet still visible, but the lighting makes the details subtler.
description_view_2: Another angled view, similar to the front, with the embossed features and glossy finish apparent.
description_view_3: Side view where the embossed text and feet are less pronounced due to lighting, but the overall shape and finish remain clear.
